Dear KHAS Preparatory Program Students,

The KHAS-LPPE Stage 2 exam will be held on

.

The students who can take the exam are as follows:

1. Students enrolled in the Spring semester 2023-24 who meet the required average,

2. Passively enrolled students in the 2023-24 academic year,

3. Students who have been deregistered according to Article 44/c of the Higher Education Law but have the right to take exams.

Students in items 2 and 3 must register for the exam between May 27-31 via the link below.

https://form.khas.edu.tr/khas-stys

Students in item 1 do not need to register.
